ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Stephen Lee's Motion To Compel Answers To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $425, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
